form.formComment: Having second run back today. Fresh up after eight months set the pace for much of the race finished second in a small field at Warrnambool Hdle on March 26 over 3200m, slow track; 1.0 len behind Sing For Peace with 74.5kg at $2.70. Will strip much fitter for the run.

form.formComment: Useful type. Last start favourite; raced just off the speed and boxed on; won by 1.0 len Warrnambool Hdle on March 26 over 3200m slow track defeating Fabalot carrying 67.5kg at $2.05 in a hurdle. Race before finished fifth of 7 starters at Cranbourne Bm70 on February 20 over 2025m, 4 len behind The Western Front with 57.5kg at $26. Ideally placed to make it back-to-back wins.

form.formComment: Having second run back today. Last run ran on from midfield; ran last at Flemington in the LR Roy Higgins on March 28 over 2600m, slow track; 14 len behind Whisky On The Hill carrying 56kg at $81. At only start last preparation came from midfield; finished third in a small field at Pakenham 1Jw Hdle on April 13 over 3200m, slow track; 2.75 len behind Noonday Gun with 71kg at $2.30. Appeals back over the jumps and is among the best hopes.

form.formComment: Returns from the paddock today. Finished off last preparation winning by 1.0 len Warrnambool Mdn Hdle-Sw July 6 over 3200m in the wet defeating Farag carrying 69.5kg at $2.90. When resuming last campaign 7 of 11 starters at Moonee Valley in the LR Torney Cup February 21 2025 over 2500m, 10 len behind Deakin carrying 55.5kg at $26. Expected to go close fresh.

form.formComment: Third-up today. Resuming sat behind the speed prior to fading to run last at Terang Bm56 on February 20 over 2156m, 13 len behind Cousins Day carrying 70kg at $21. Second-up raced on the pace then finished third of 10 runners at Warrnambool Mdn Hdle-Sw on March 26 over 3200m, on slow going 23 len behind Karburan carrying 67.5kg at $8. Looks to have the job ahead.

form.formComment: Is making a debut in a jumps race. Two back got back early finished seventh of 11 runners at Ballarat 0 - 62 on March 20 over 2042m, 10 len behind Ongatiti carrying 54kg at $151 and last start finished second of 10 starters at Healesville Pic-Trpy on March 28 over 2350m, on rain affected going; 1.75 len behind Rule Of Salex carrying 66kg at $12. Solid on the flat latest but happy to watch this time.

form.formComment: Second-up today. First-up after two months finished ninth of 10 runners at Warrnambool Mdn Hdle-Sw on March 26 over 3200m, slow track; 48 len behind Karburan with 69.5kg at $11. Previously second-up ran last at Flemington Bm78 on January 17 over 2520m, 51 len behind Dictionary carrying 58kg at $101. First up effort suggests unlikely to be winning.
